findings.description: The '日本語は通じない' callout appears inside the illustration box next to the figure, functioning as a caption label. The JSON correctly separates the figure (p343::1) from this term definition (p343::2); the split is accurate and both entities are faithful to the image.

The two bullet points on the image ('「プログラミング」からの出題数は少ない' and '「プログラミング」の問題は、覚えることが多いうえに、解くのが大変') are folded into the definition body rather than rendered as a structured list. Content is preserved; format abstraction is acceptable.

reviewer_notes: Page introduces Lesson 09-07 プログラミング① 基礎知識. All major visual blocks are captured: lesson header section, illustration figure with caption, '日本語は通じない' callout term, 2022年4月 exam-scope paragraph, and the two-bullet caution note on programming question cost-performance. Translations are accurate and natural. No high- or med-severity findings.
